revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Like]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2501 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#switch:{{lc:{{{icon|}}}}} |old = [[File:{{{image|Symbol thumbs up.svg}}} |class=skin-invert-image|text-top|link=|alt=👍|16px]] {{#if:{{{num|}}}|{{{num|}}} {{PLURAL:{{{num|}}}|user {{{1|likes}}}|users {{{1|like}}}}} this.|{{#if:{{{username|}}}| [[User:{{{username|}}}|{{{username|}}}]] likes this.|{{{1|Like}}}}}}} |fb = [[File:{{{image|Facebook like thumb.png}}} |text-top|link=|alt=👍|16px]] {{#if:{{{num|}}}|{{{num|}}} {{PLURAL:{{{num|}}}|user {{{1|likes}}}|users {{{1|like}}}}} this.|{{#if:{{{username|}}}| [[User:{{{username|}}}|{{{username|}}}]] likes this.|{{{1|Like}}}}}}} |[[File:{{{image|Wikipedia like SVG.svg}}} |25px|link=|alt=👍]] '''{{#if:{{{num|}}}|{{{num|}}} {{PLURAL:{{{num|}}}|user {{{1|likes}}}|users {{{1|like}}}}} this.|{{#if:{{{username|}}}| [[User:{{{username|}}}|{{{username|}}}]] likes this.|{{{1|Like}}}}}}}'''}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
